overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city. The player character navigates busy sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes pedestrians with glowing umbrellas while holographic advertisements illuminate the wet streets.

agents.ego_description: walking under elevated highway toward distant billboard, passing concrete walls

large holographic advertisement displaying a pink humanoid figure

wall with red graffiti reading TYGER CLAWS and colorful spray paint art

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive elevated highway overpass in a rain-soaked cyberpunk city. The camera walks forward along a marked crosswalk toward a distant holographic billboard, passing concrete retaining walls. The scene transitions abruptly when passing a graffiti-covered wall marked with 'TYGER CLAWS' in red letters, signaling the exit from the covered walkway.

events.description: crossing street as vehicles pass by in the background

agents.ego_description: walking along wet sidewalk past benches and neon signs, crossing the street

notable_agents.action: yellow van driving down the wet street with headlights on

entered.detail: red rectangular sign with white text reading Skyline North
large green neon sign with letters DIR on building facade
concrete benches and planters along the sidewalk edge
tall futuristic buildings with glass facades and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a rain-slicked city street lined with glass towers. The camera walks along the sidewalk past concrete benches and planters, with a red 'Skyline North' sign visible on the right. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights as the character crosses the street while a yellow van drives past in the background.

crossing the street with a group of pedestrians

street corner with curb and pedestrian waiting area
bright red neon sign with geometric shapes

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a busy urban intersection, waiting at the corner near a traffic light pole as vehicles pass by. After the light changes, the camera crosses the street with a group of pedestrians, passing a black car and a person with red hair waiting at the corner. The wet asphalt reflects the surrounding neon signs including a prominent red geometric one.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy covered sidewalk under elevated highway with neon storefronts

events.description: close-up view of pedestrian with glowing blue umbrella temporarily fills frame
entering denser crowd section of the sidewalk with many pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking through busy sidewalk crowd with many pedestrians carrying glowing neon umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with illuminated blue umbrella waiting at traffic light
pedestrian with green glowing umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: person holding a large umbrella with bright blue neon illumination along the edges
shops and commercial entrances with illuminated signs at street level
tall street lights with neon illumination casting light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: Walking along a busy sidewalk now sheltered under the elevated highway, the camera moves through a dense crowd of pedestrians. Many carry futuristic umbrellas with glowing neon edges in blue and green. The street is lined with ground-level storefronts and neon street lamps. At around 24 seconds, a pedestrian with a prominently glowing blue umbrella fills the frame in a close-up shot before the camera continues through the crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban plaza intersection with overhead digital screens

crossing the wide intersection with walk signal illuminated

entered.detail: wide open paved area marking a major street intersection with multiple crossing paths
green illuminated text reading WALK painted on the crosswalk stripes
large suspended digital billboards hanging above the intersection displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a vast urban plaza at a major intersection. The camera approaches and enters the wide crosswalk marked with green illuminated 'WALK' signage on the ground. Overhead, massive digital screens hang suspended above the intersection displaying holographic advertisements. The elevated highway now spans directly overhead as the character crosses the expansive plaza with other pedestrians, surrounded by the glow of neon signs reflecting off the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered concrete underpass into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city plaza. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass, moving along a rain-soaked crosswalk past concrete walls until it passes a graffiti-covered wall marked with red Tyger Claws lettering. As the camera emerges from the cover, the scene opens into a rain-slicked street lined with glass towers and reflecting neon lights, where the character navigates a busy intersection alongside passing vehicles and pedestrians. The movement then shifts back under the shelter of the elevated highway, pushing through a dense crowd of people carrying glowing blue and green neon umbrellas. Finally, the environment expands into a vast urban plaza, where the camera crosses a wide intersection marked by illuminated green walk signs beneath massive suspended holographic advertisements.
